In particular, under the guidance of
                                                                                                                    the central government and the State Council, CDB has delicately
                                                                                                                    operated a number of foreign exchange lending projects like China–
                                                                                                                    Russia Oil Pipeline Project, China–Venezuela Fund and China–
                                                                                                                    Africa Fund, which have great strategic significance and are vital to
                                                                                                                    the national economic security. As China is at the primary stage of socialism, CDB has played
